FaZe win Cologne opener

Striker 2026-04-22 10:30

FaZe opened their Cologne run with a composed 2-0 win over GamerLegion.

Finn "karrigan" Andersen said the team kept its early-game protocols simple and trusted the calling in late rounds.

"We knew the veto gave us room to play our own game," karrigan said.
CS2 IEM Cologne
